channel.title: Invisible Labor on Mariatta
channel.description: Recent content in Invisible Labor on Mariatta

item.title: I'm Graduating Too
item.description:
I just ran the last hot lunch of the year for my youngest son’s school.

He’s graduating from middle school and will be going to high school in the next school year. Which makes me a graduating parent too. And it means that it wasn’t just the last hot lunch of the school year. It’s the last one I’ll ever run.

I’ve been running it for the last three years alongside a small group of other parent volunteers. Three school years of handling orders, payments, receipts, buying and stockpiling pop drinks in bulk, vendor coordination, and a lot of things that happen quietly in the background.
